description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from five parallel wooden slats, each fastened with visible metal bolts. The frame and legs are constructed from robust black metal, providing both support and a modern aesthetic. The bench has a slightly reclined backrest for ergonomic comfort, and the seat is wide enough to accommodate multiple people. The legs are designed in a squared, floor-anchored style, ensuring stability on various surfaces. The wood has a dark brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal frame. There are no armrests, giving the bench an open and accessible design suitable for parks, sidewalks, or public spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden slat bench with a black metal frame and backrest, designed for outdoor public use. The bench is sturdy, open-sided, and lacks armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden slats, the reclined backrest, and the squared metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the five evenly spaced wooden slats and the open, armrest-free design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the seat and backrest alignment.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backrest slats, metal support structure, and the robust attachment of the legs.
attribute_leg_design: two wide black metal supports with squared feet
